body:
### User Story
As a user, I want to see a temporary preview of a wallpaper on the desktop when I select it in the Wallpaper Selector window, so that I can decide if it looks good before applying it permanently.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Clicking a wallpaper option in the "Change Wallpaper" window temporarily updates the actual desktop wallpaper.
- [ ] Closing the window or clicking "Cancel" reverts the desktop wallpaper to the previously saved version.
- [ ] Clicking "Apply" saves the currently previewed wallpaper as the new desktop wallpaper.
- [ ] The preview should not be persisted to local storage unless "Apply" is clicked.

### Technical Notes
- `OSDesktop` state should manage a `previewWallpaper` value.
- The desktop background style in `OSDesktopView` (around `OSDesktop.tsx:431-438`) should prioritize `previewWallpaper` over the stored `wallpaper`.
- `WallpaperSelector` needs a callback (e.g., `onPreview`) to notify `OSDesktop` of a selection change.
- `Win95Window` close handler or `WallpaperSelector`'s `onCancel` should clear the preview.
title: [Feature]: Temporary wallpaper preview in Wallpaper Selector
